ai_tips: Starting out at 478m — 4.11km ahead with 37m of climbing on the profile. 从海拔478米出发——全程4.11公里，累计爬升37米。
0.35km in — pace 5:55/km as the effort builds. 进行到0.35公里——配速5:55/公里，强度正在建立。
Halfway to the high point — 3m of the 14m climb done, grade here -1.9%. Short, quick steps keep this efficient. 爬升至最高点过半——14米总爬升已完成3米，此处坡度-1.9%。缩小步幅、加快步频会更省力。
High point of the route: 493m at 2.83km. From here the route mostly gives back. 全程最高点493米，位于2.83公里处。此后路线总体向下。
Steepest descent of the day: -45.5% at 2.85km — you let it flow at 6:13/km, good downhill confidence. 全天最陡的下坡：2.85公里处坡度-45.5%——你顺势加速到6:13/公里，下坡信心不错。
3.92km — late-run check: pace 6:31/km, still holding form well. 3.92公里——后程检查：配速6:31/公里，节奏保持得不错。
Finished 4.11km in 26:25 (avg 6:26/km, +37m). Solid, steady effort end to end. 完成4.11公里，用时26:25（平均配速6:26/公里，爬升37米）。全程稳定扎实。
